PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-27-2010 Continued To May-18-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 292711 Estate of Elfriede Erika Preger.

Appearances: Ingrid Hsia for Gudrun Schappi.

Ms. Hsia reported that they reached a settlement, stated that the settlement agreement had been signed and that she would be filing a petition for approval of the settlement agreement. The Court advised Ms. Hsia that the two cases would be consolidated. Case number 293136 will be consolidated with case number 292711. All papers are to be filed in case number 292711 (lead case). Both matters were continued to May 18, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of filing of the Petition for Approval of the Settlement Agreement.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
